title: achillea millefolium subsp. compacta
intro: Achillea millefolium subsp. compacta, also known as compact yarrow, is a subspecies of the yarrow plant, characterized by its compact growth habit and smaller leaves compared to the typical yarrow plant. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of compact yarrow include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular herb in natural remedies. Compact yarrow can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used topically in the form of salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
